title: OpenAI plans a screenless smart speaker with ChatGPT to compete with Alexa
summary: OpenAI's first physical device will be a screenless speaker that integrates the ChatGPT language model.

title: China's CXMT approaches Micron's DRAM capacity and becomes the second largest producer worldwide
summary: Chinese memory will match the US giant's production this year and receives support from MSI motherboard.

title: Apple launches public beta of iOS 27 with new Siri and Apple Intelligence features
summary: The update allows users to test artificial intelligence improvements in the virtual assistant.

title: Microsoft publishes a record over 600 security patches, including two active zero-days
summary: A researcher published exploit code just after Patch Tuesday, while the company fixed a historic number of flaws.

title: Vulnerability in Cursor editor allows remote code execution when cloning malicious repositories
summary: The security flaw puts developers at risk until official fixes are applied.

title: PS5 emulation on PC accelerates development and now runs 2D and 3D games
summary: The emulator community progresses rapidly after Sony's decision to reduce physical games.

title: Meta employees sue over layoffs based on discriminatory AI systems
summary: Workers accuse the company of using biased algorithms in selecting for mass layoffs.

title: DeepSeek negotiates $1.5 billion round and plans to go public
summary: The Chinese AI startup seeks additional funding just weeks after closing a mega $7 billion round.

title: Google integrates AI image generation in search and Google Images
summary: The engine generates synthetic images when it does not find relevant visual results on the web.

title: Starlink introduces smaller, lighter, and more efficient V5 residential kit
summary: The new antenna halves power consumption and size, offering speeds up to 375 Mbps.

title: HWiNFO and HWMonitor incorporate hotspot temperature monitoring on NVIDIA RTX 50
summary: The monitoring tools allow measuring the hottest point of the new Series 50 graphics cards.

title: Nvidia and Sega team up to bring RTX Spark technologies to future games
summary: The collaboration will debut with Virtua Fighter Crossroads and open Sega's catalog on RTX Spark PCs.

title: Palit relaunches GeForce RTX 3060 with 12 GB as a solution to the AI crisis
summary: The 2021 GPU returns with a new design to meet the demand for artificial intelligence hardware.

title: Intel invests $5 billion in its Ireland plant to boost chip manufacturing in Europe
summary: The company bets on the Irish factory to offset the cancellation of its complex in Germany.

title: Linux arrives on classic Sega consoles with port for 32X and improvements on Dreamcast
summary: The open-source community expands Linux support for two retro Sega systems, including modern peripherals.

title: Two security vulnerabilities in Claude expose users' private data
summary: Researchers show how a faulty Chrome extension and prompt injection can leak sensitive information.

title: Best Buy discounts $900 on Asus ROG Flow Z13 laptop with 64 GB of RAM
summary: The 2-in-1 gaming and AI device is offered at $2,099 in a temporary promotion.

title: Discrepancy between ASUS and iFixit on repairability of ROG Flow Z13
summary: While ASUS gives it a 10/10, iFixit considers the real score to be 7 out of 10.

title: SpaceX bonds plummet 10% and approach junk bond status
summary: The space company's debt trades lower due to concerns about its financial health.

title: YouTube and X become gateway to AI non-consensual nudity apps
summary: Social platforms facilitate access to AI-generated nudity services.
